description: Letter from Natan b. Nahray (Alexandria) to Nahray b. Nissim (Fustat), ca. 1065. Mentions a silk cloak ordered by Nahray and shoes that were sent to him but did not arrive. Natan b. Nahray asks Nahray to send him some wine. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, p. 426 and from Goitein notes linked below.)
description_he: מכתב מנתן בן נהראי, מאלכסנדריה, לנהראי בן ניסים, כ-1065, על גלימת משי ונעליים ויין
